name: stop_intent_natural
notes: CL-2026-07-03-fluid-consent-and-control: natural stop phrasing must pause via the SAME audited path (keyword STOP remains the floor). expected_fail until VT-583 C lands + verifies. Opt-out/DSR is short-circuited ahead of the journey gate (matches_opt_out_or_dsr), so this is independent of onboarding state — run against a plain onboarded, no-active-flow tenant: `setup --onboarded` (no --journey, no --flow) then `script <tenant> stop_intent_natural.json`.

steps.message: please stop messaging me for now
steps.note: Stop-intent in natural words. Expect an honest pause acknowledgment, not a canned demand for the literal keyword.
